{{Quote|Send a priority one signal to the Jedi Council! Reverse engines! Full thrust! Activate escape pods!|[[Captain Cautious]]'s last orders|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 23">[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]]</ref>}}
'''[[Captain Cautious]]'s freighter''' was a transport which was destroyed by the [[Infinity Gate]].
